features: Penthouse corner 2BR/2.5BA condop with private balcony and open city views
Sun-filled layout with 9’ ceilings and ~1,100 SF of living space
Open kitchen flowing into dining and expansive living area—ideal for entertaining
Flexible ownership with no board approval and subletting allowed
Full-service, pet-friendly building with 24-hour doorman and on-site staff
Amenities include fitness center, roof deck, concierge, and garage access
Prime Upper East Side location near dining, shopping, and transportation
features_zh: 顶层角落 2室/2.5卫 共有产权公寓 (Condop)，带私人阳台，坐拥开阔城市景观
阳光充足的布局，9 英尺天花板，约 1,100 平方英尺的起居空间
开放式厨房与用餐区和宽敞的起居区相连——非常适合招待客人
灵活的产权形式，无需董事会批准，允许转租
提供全方位服务、允许饲养宠物的建筑，配备 24 小时门卫和现场工作人员
设施包括健身中心、屋顶露台、礼宾服务和车库通道
上东区黄金地段，靠近餐饮、购物和交通设施

address: 415 E 37th St APT 11A, New York, NY 10016
features: Newly renovated 1-bedroom (potential 1BR + den) with stunning East River views
Sun-filled 860 SF layout with oversized windows and wide-plank hardwood floors
Excellent storage including walk-in closet and potential for in-unit washer/dryer
Full-service, white-glove building with 24-hour doorman and concierge
Extensive amenities including rooftop pool, fitness centers, spa, and screening room
Prime Murray Hill location near parks, Trader Joe’s, Grand Central, and major transit
Convenient access to FDR Drive, Midtown Tunnel, and ferry service
features_zh: 全新装修的 1 居室（有潜力改为 1室 + 书房），坐拥令人惊叹的东河景观
阳光充足的 860 平方英尺布局，配有超大窗户和宽板硬木地板
极佳的储物空间，包括步入式衣橱，并有安装室内洗衣机/烘干机的潜力
提供全方位白手套服务的建筑，配备 24 小时门卫和礼宾服务
广泛的设施，包括屋顶游泳池、健身中心、水疗中心和放映室
Murray Hill 黄金地段，靠近公园、Trader Joe’s、中央车站和主要交通枢纽
前往 FDR Drive、Midtown 隧道和渡轮服务非常便利
